markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review October performance and align on future content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Record October Performance:** Clicks (+10.7%) and impressions (+17%) hit all-time highs, defying industry-wide volatility from AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**New Content Strategy:** Approved two new pillars—"Subject-Specific AI" and "AI Literacy"—to replicate the success of the high-traffic "AI for Math" post.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**Content Mix Shift:** The weekly content mix will shift to 50% refreshes (from 40%) to improve underperforming, high-impression articles.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Reddit Engagement Gap:** Identified a critical gap in Reddit engagement, which is essential for boosting SchoolAI's brand presence and citations in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

## Topics

### October Performance Review

  - [**Record-Breaking Month:** October was the best-performing month ever, with clicks +10.7% and impressions +17% MoM.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [This growth defies a broader industry trend of traffic loss since September, likely due to AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**Top Performers:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
      - **"AI for Math"** remains the \#1 traffic driver.
      - [**"Peer and Self-Assessment"** (published Sep 24) is a breakout success, quickly generating high impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**LLM Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**"AI for Math"** is also a top performer in LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**"Best Free AI Tools"** is dropping in LLM performance, which is expected as it's a redirect and no longer meets user intent for top tool lists.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [**"Formative Assessment" Niche:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [This content cluster dominates LLM citations, appearing in 50–100% of relevant AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [**Why it works:** The strategy of targeting specific, long-tail queries is effective because competitors are not covering the topic in the same depth.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)

### Content Strategy & Execution

  - [**New Content Pillars Approved:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
      - [**Pillar 1: Subject-Specific AI**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
          - [**Goal:** Replicate the success of the "AI for Math" post.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
          - [**Examples:** "AI for Special Education," "AI Chemistry Help."](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [**Pillar 2: AI Literacy & Implementation**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
          - [**Goal:** Establish SchoolAI as a thought leader on responsible AI use.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
          - [**Examples:** "AI Literacy for Students," "AI Ethics in Education."](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [**Content Mix Shift:** The weekly content mix will change from 40% refreshes to 50%.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Refreshes are showing strong results and are an efficient way to improve underperforming articles with high impressions but low clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Pending Approvals:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [**Platform Alignment Doc:** Awaiting review from Tucker.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [**FAQ Doc:** Awaiting final review from Nikki.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [**PSEO & Image Generation:** Awaiting decisions from Nikki.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)

### Reddit Engagement Strategy

  - [**Problem:** SchoolAI has a minimal presence on Reddit, a key channel for teacher conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**Impact:** This absence hinders brand awareness and limits citations in LLMs, which favor brands with strong online community engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**Goal:** Increase SchoolAI's visibility and discussion on relevant subreddits (e.g., `r/edtech`, `r/instructionaldesign`).](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**Potential Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Internal Resources:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
          - [Ask the educator advocacy manager to engage the "Champions" program.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
          - [Use tools like **Gummy Search** to monitor conversations (GrowthX is exploring a partnership).](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
      - [**External Resources:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
          - [Evaluate a cold email offer for a Reddit monitoring service.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
          - [Consider Reddit ads.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nikki:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
      - [Review the Platform Alignment Doc and ping Tucker for his review.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [Provide decisions on PSEO, image generation, and new content pillars.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
      - [Consult the educator advocacy manager on a Reddit engagement strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
      - [Build out topics for the new content pillars in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [Research Reddit engagement strategies and the Gummy Search tool.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Jenn:**](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Add more refresh topics to Airtable for the 50/50 content mix.](https://fathom.video/share/C_AtxHDtDwMPg6st4Njwcmegt5hh-UQu?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
